'''Taboth''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Both system]]. 

It was a barren world with a thin [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], where only simple life-forms, if any, could live. It was orbited by two [[Moon/Legends|satellites]].<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
